security_gap.gap_description: Vote input may be spoofed without signature verification.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system accepts unsigned votes from external actors.

assumptions: The governance contract does not enforce signature verification for vote messages.
The actor is able to access the voting interface without authentication.

mitigation.strategy: Require signature-based vote authentication and role validation.

description: An attacker may impersonate a user and submit fraudulent votes to the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: Malicious actors can alter votes without proper authorization.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Votes can be manipulated without sufficient integrity checks.

assumptions: The governance contract does not have mechanisms to prevent vote tampering.
The actor can access and modify the vote data before submission.

mitigation.strategy: Implement data integrity checks and validation of vote data.

description: An attacker may modify votes before submission to influence the outcome of governance decisions.

security_gap.gap_description: Lack of proper audit trail for votes.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system does not provide a reliable way to track who voted for what.

assumptions: The governance contract does not record sufficient metadata to trace back votes to their originators.
There is no secure logging mechanism to record vote events reliably.

mitigation.strategy: Implement a comprehensive audit trail that records all vote events with sufficient metadata.

description: An attacker may cast votes and deny their involvement in the process.

security_gap.gap_description: Votes might be exposed during transmission or storage.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Vote data may be intercepted or leaked.

assumptions: The system does not encrypt vote data during transmission or storage.
The actor has access to the network or storage where vote data is processed.

mitigation.strategy: Encrypt vote data during transmission and storage.

description: An attacker may gain access to sensitive vote information.
